WU-A.easy: Name one thing you noticed about Valkyrie this week.
WU-A.medium: Tell Valkyrie one thing they do that you've never said out loud.
WU-A.hard: What have you been noticing about Valkyrie that you've been afraid to name?

WU-J.easy: What sparkle, bit, or chaotic delight feels most like Valkyrie?
WU-J.medium: What truth about Valkyrie's fire should be celebrated out loud?
WU-J.hard: What power do you see in Valkyrie when they stop softening themself for everyone else's comfort?

WU-Q.easy: What would help this room feel softer for Valkyrie today?
WU-Q.medium: Where could Valkyrie let the party hold them instead of holding the party?
WU-Q.hard: What kind of attention would let Valkyrie feel wanted without needing to perform?

WU-K.easy: What has changed in how you see Valkyrie this year?
WU-K.medium: What part of Valkyrie's becoming feels most alive to you?
WU-K.hard: What are you witnessing in Valkyrie that they may not yet trust is real?

WU-2.easy: What is one beautiful thing you are bringing into Valkyrie's space today?
WU-2.medium: What feeling do you want to name before the spa magic begins?
WU-2.hard: What would become possible if everyone here admitted they want to be treasured too?

WU-3.easy: Pick a texture for today: silk, salt, steam, flame, feather, or gold. Why?
WU-3.medium: What sensation helps you feel safe enough to receive care?
WU-3.hard: What does your body know about being treasured that your mind keeps negotiating?

WU-4.easy: What is one gentle truth the room should remember today?
WU-4.medium: What need could be spoken plainly instead of hinted at?
WU-4.hard: What unsaid thing would make care easier if it were named with kindness?

WU-5.easy: Who in the room might need a little extra tenderness today?
WU-5.medium: What are you noticing at the edge of the party that deserves care?
WU-5.hard: Where does attention need to move so nobody gets lost while Valkyrie shines?

WU-6.easy: What helps you arrive in your body?
WU-6.medium: What would make you feel welcome in the luxury of today?
WU-6.hard: What performance can you set down so the party can meet the real you?

WU-7.easy: Witness one thing Valkyrie is doing beautifully today.
WU-7.medium: Witness one thing someone else is offering the room.
WU-7.hard: What do you want witnessed in you without needing to turn it into a joke?

WU-8.easy: Where should your attention go for the next three minutes?
WU-8.medium: What kind of attention would feel like a gift to Valkyrie?
WU-8.hard: What does loving attention look like when it is not control?

WU-9.easy: What old stress can the hot water, fire, or robe take from you?
WU-9.medium: What do you keep paying for with your ease?
WU-9.hard: What would you stop spending energy on if receiving care were allowed to be simple?

WU-10.easy: Where is the party already becoming warmer?
WU-10.medium: What distance could be closed with one generous gesture?
WU-10.hard: What invitation would bring you closer without crowding anyone?

CU-A.easy: What is one small honesty that would make today easier?
CU-A.medium: What boundary would help you relax enough to enjoy the party?
CU-A.hard: What pattern of over-giving, people-pleasing, or avoidance is ready for a spa-day rinse?

CU-J.easy: What do you need to ask for before you pretend you do not need it?
CU-J.medium: What would be easier if you said it directly and kindly?
CU-J.hard: What confession would make more room for pleasure, care, and consent?

CU-Q.easy: What deserves a soft apology today?
CU-Q.medium: Where could repair feel like moisturizing instead of punishment?
CU-Q.hard: What would accountable care look like without shame taking over the room?

CU-K.easy: What role do you want to play in making today feel good?
CU-K.medium: How can you tend relationships better in this room?
CU-K.hard: What does mature celebration ask of you when desire, attention, and care all want a seat?

CU-2.easy: What reaction in you might actually be information about your own needs?
CU-2.medium: Where are you tempted to judge what you secretly want?
CU-2.hard: What would happen if envy became a map instead of a verdict?

CU-3.easy: Ask for one tiny form of care today.
CU-3.medium: What do you want from the room that you could ask for cleanly?
CU-3.hard: What would Valkyrie need to practice asking for so receiving can become real?

CU-4.easy: What is not actually fine and could use a gentle adjustment?
CU-4.medium: What comfort, consent, or accessibility need should be named?
CU-4.hard: Where is pretending fine getting in the way of being treasured?

CU-5.easy: What old habit should not run the party today?
CU-5.medium: What do you do when you want attention but fear being too much?
CU-5.hard: How can wanting the spotlight become an invitation instead of a pressure system?

CU-6.easy: What small repair would make the room feel cleaner?
CU-6.medium: Where could you offer care before anyone has to chase you?
CU-6.hard: What would you make right if repair were an act of devotion, not self-attack?

CU-7.easy: What gift can you give back to Valkyrie today?
CU-7.medium: What has Valkyrie modeled that you can return in kind?
CU-7.hard: How can you treasure Valkyrie without making them manage your effort?

CU-8.easy: What shadow part of you needs a robe and a glass of juice?
CU-8.medium: What version of you gets loud when you are under-cared-for?
CU-8.hard: How can your difficult part be welcomed without letting it drive?

CU-9.easy: What caretaking job can you set down for one hour?
CU-9.medium: What does being reliable cost when nobody asks what you need?
CU-9.hard: Where do you confuse being useful with being lovable?

CU-10.easy: What can you release so you can actually receive today?
CU-10.medium: Where is control blocking the treasure?
CU-10.hard: What would trusting the room look like if nobody had to earn it perfectly first?

GU-A.easy: What relationship tending skill wants to level up today?
GU-A.medium: What capacity would make you easier to love and celebrate?
GU-A.hard: What would it mean to become someone who can hold desire, care, and freedom at once?

GU-J.easy: What playful part of you wants permission?
GU-J.medium: What guarded part wants to be seen without being fixed?
GU-J.hard: What would you risk showing if you trusted this room to stay kind?

GU-Q.easy: What are you growing into this birthday season?
GU-Q.medium: What does your next era of being treasured require?
GU-Q.hard: What does Valkyrie's next era ask them to receive, not just perform?

GU-K.easy: What pattern across your friendships are you proud of?
GU-K.medium: What friendship pattern are you ready to compost?
GU-K.hard: What would relationship tending look like in actual daily care?

GU-2.easy: What story about yourself is ready for a kinder rewrite?
GU-2.medium: What protective story keeps you from receiving love cleanly?
GU-2.hard: What if being treasured did not require proving you are never too much?

GU-3.easy: Ask someone a question that helps you care for them better.
GU-3.medium: What question would make today's intimacy more honest?
GU-3.hard: What do you need to learn about someone's needs before assuming your love lands?

GU-4.easy: What are you being asked to grow into today?
GU-4.medium: What would stretch you without snapping you?
GU-4.hard: Where does your nervous system need practice receiving attention without taking control?

GU-5.easy: What would someone who loves you wish you enjoyed more?
GU-5.medium: What pleasure are your people rooting for you to claim?
GU-5.hard: What do the people who love Valkyrie wish they understood about receiving care well?

GU-6.easy: What did you learn about receiving care that you are ready to update?
GU-6.medium: What body-care ritual helps rewrite that lesson?
GU-6.hard: What inherited rule about need, attention, or pleasure can the Fire Bird burn clean?

GU-7.easy: What permission can you give yourself before the next activity?
GU-7.medium: What would change if you stopped waiting to be effortless before joining?
GU-7.hard: Where can you participate imperfectly instead of disappearing or managing?

GU-8.easy: What blind spot might your friends be lovingly trying to show you?
GU-8.medium: What do your people know about your care patterns that you are still learning?
GU-8.hard: What would change if feedback felt like devotion instead of exile?

GU-9.easy: What threshold are you crossing in your mid-30s?
GU-9.medium: What part of you is becoming more Teal, more relational, more free?
GU-9.hard: What are you afraid of becoming if you stop organizing yourself around being liked?

GU-10.easy: What does your future self want from this room?
GU-10.medium: What habit would help your future relationships feel nourished?
GU-10.hard: What does the person you are becoming need from friendship, partnership, and chosen family?

SU-A.easy: Offer one small treasure to someone nearby.
SU-A.medium: Make the first move toward care without waiting to be asked.
SU-A.hard: Do one thing today that helps Valkyrie receive without coordinating it.

SU-J.easy: Make someone laugh, soften, or sparkle.
SU-J.medium: Offer a playful risk that makes the party warmer.
SU-J.hard: Do the generous thing that feels exposing because it reveals you care.

SU-Q.easy: Open one door for comfort: water, towel, snack, blanket, seat, check-in.
SU-Q.medium: Remove one tiny barrier between someone and ease.
SU-Q.hard: Make care more accessible without making anyone explain why they need it.

SU-K.easy: Show Valkyrie you have been paying attention.
SU-K.medium: Do something only possible because you actually see what delights them.
SU-K.hard: Offer attention that honors Valkyrie without demanding they validate your offering.

SU-2.easy: Do one helpful thing before anyone asks.
SU-2.medium: Anticipate a need in the room and meet it quietly.
SU-2.hard: Practice proactive care that does not turn into control.

SU-3.easy: Show up for the spa day with your whole pampered self.
SU-3.medium: Pick one way to help everyone feel treasured, not just entertained.
SU-3.hard: Make the room better for Valkyrie without making Valkyrie the manager of your care.

SU-4.easy: Commit to one small party kindness and do it.
SU-4.medium: What habit would make you a better high-quality human/cryptid?
SU-4.hard: What relational practice are you willing to build because chosen family matters?

SU-5.easy: Notice one person's comfort and support it.
SU-5.medium: Do something that proves you are paying attention to the room.
SU-5.hard: Let attention become service without losing your sparkle.

SU-6.easy: Coordinate one tiny ease: water, towel, snack, robe, playlist, cleanup.
SU-6.medium: Plan one care move so someone else can relax.
SU-6.hard: Follow through without needing applause, rescue, or supervision.

SU-7.easy: Check in with someone who has been quiet.
SU-7.hard: Notice who is outside the center and bring them warmth without dragging them into the spotlight.

SU-8.easy: Notice one place the room could use more warmth, then add it.
SU-8.medium: Move toward the thing you would usually avoid.
SU-8.hard: Show up where avoidance or people-pleasing would normally make you vanish.

SU-9.easy: Pour something generous into the room.
SU-9.medium: Offer a real act of care that costs attention, not performance.
SU-9.hard: Give in a way that treasures Valkyrie, yourself, and the group at the same time.

SU-10.easy: Give the care only you could give today.
SU-10.medium: Offer one act of reciprocity that feels specific, embodied, and real.
SU-10.hard: How can you treasure Valkyrie, treasure yourself, and treasure each other in one move?
